summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Football Moneyball Intelligence Layer + Pattern Memory epic. All 979 pytest tests pass (including 36 new football_moneyball tests). Backend startup successfully creates 16 Mongo indexes. New endpoint /api/football/pattern-memory/summary works correctly with authentication and fail-soft behavior. MLB and Basketball endpoints remain unaffected. Football picks endpoint continues to work without breaking changes.

notes: Backend startup logs confirm: '[FOOTBALL_MONEYBALL] indexes ensured: created=16 errors=0'
All 4 new Mongo collections created: football_team_daily_profiles, football_match_intelligence_snapshots, football_market_results, football_pattern_memory

No football picks currently available to verify full enrichment in live environment, but pytest confirms all logic works
Frontend testing skipped as per testing_type: 'backend only(skip frontend)'

16 football_moneyball Mongo indexes created successfully on startup
GET /api/football/pattern-memory/summary returns 200 with correct shape {available:true, items:[], count:0, generated_at:...} when DB is empty

Full pytest suite: 979 tests passed in 3.00s (943 existing + 36 new football_moneyball tests)
test_football_moneyball.py: All 36 tests passed covering warehouse, pressure profile, snapshot builder, pattern memory, market selection, feedback loop, and pattern matcher

Backend is production-ready for Football Moneyball Intelligence Layer
